sources.note: NYC DOT identifies Battery Place treatment and launch date but does not name the Queens express candidates individually.
NYC Open Data metadata for the DOT bus-lane dataset.
Authoritative NYC DOT Bus Lanes - Local Streets API snapshot; selected records are retained separately without geometry.
NYC DOT data catalog linking the official Bus Lane Locations dataset.
NYC DOT project index exposing official community-board presentations for 2019 projects.
NYC DOT project index exposing official community-board and advisory-board presentations for 2021 projects.
NYC DOT project index exposing official community-board presentations for 2023 projects.
NYC DOT project index exposing official community-board presentations for 2024 projects.
NYC DOT project index exposing official community-board presentations for 2025 projects.
Brooklyn CB18 presentation covers the intersection project but does not establish a Q35 bus-lane implementation relationship.
Queens CB5 minutes identify the Fresh Pond Road proposal and the Q58, QM24, QM25, and QM34 routes; none is a Queens-shard candidate for this corridor/date.
Queens CB8 final proposal documents extent, design, engagement, and planned summer/fall 2025 implementation.
NYC DOT identifies the 144th Street-Springfield Boulevard extent and July 2025 construction start, but does not enumerate all 17 MTA routes in text.
NYC DOT identifies the Jamaica and Archer busway extents and installation timing but not an exhaustive route list.
NYC DOT identifies the Merrick Boulevard lane extent and Q4, Q5, Q84, and Q85 among the served MTA routes.
Official MTA Board staff summary documenting Board approval and implementation phases for the Queens Bus Network Redesign. curl fallback used after fetch status 403.
Official MTA final-plan Q1 profile says the route uses Hillside Avenue and changes took effect June 29, 2025. curl fallback used after fetch status 403.
Official Queens Bus Network Redesign Proposed Final Plan Addendum summary. curl fallback used after fetch status 403.
NYC DOT identifies Northern Boulevard project routes Q66, QM2, QM3, QM20, and QM32.
Queens CB2 presentation lists current routes on a defined Queens Boulevard section; it postdates and does not establish the 2023 candidate lane onset.
Queens CB14 presentation identifies Q22, Q52 SBS, Q53 SBS, QM16, and QM17 as routes served by the Rockaway Beach Boulevard improvements.
NYC DOT identifies M15 local/SBS as the served route; it does not support QM63/QM64 candidate-specific onset.
NYC DOT identifies M98, M101, M102, and M103; it does not name the Queens express candidates.
NYC DOT identifies the 21st Street extent and Q66, Q69, Q100, plus one-block Q102/Q103 service.
NYC DOT identifies Bx12 SBS as the served route; it does not support the Q50 registry projection.

web_search_method: Official-domain web searches were performed by corridor groups on 2026-07-15; exact query strings are repeated in each receipt. Retrieved official result URLs were then byte-fetched where possible.
